title: perideridia bolanderi
intro: Perideridia bolanderi, also known as Bolander's yewroot, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Bolander's yewroot include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Bolander's yewroot can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
